title: Aurobindo Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Aurobindo Pharma is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Aurobindo Pharma has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aurobindo Pharma:
Aurobindo Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma!
